summary: Iteration 11 — Engagement Workflow Testing. Tested the engagement submission/validation/rejection workflow. Found critical pre-existing bugs that make the entire workflow non-functional despite the expires_at fix from this iteration. The validate queue consistently shows 0 results even when PENDING records exist in DB due to case mismatch. UI code review confirms reject-reason two-phase UI was implemented correctly in ValidateQueueClient.

critical.issue: Inserts status: 'pending' (lowercase) but DB check constraint requires uppercase 'PENDING'. Also missing required NOT NULL fields: submission_date, file_size_bytes, mime_type, and proof_url is set to null but DB requires non-null. Submission will always fail with constraint violations.

Queries .eq('status', 'pending') (lowercase) but DB stores uppercase 'PENDING'. PostgreSQL text comparison is case-sensitive so validate queue always returns 0 results even when PENDING submissions exist. Confirmed via direct Supabase REST API test.

Updates status to 'approved'/'rejected' (lowercase) but DB check constraint requires uppercase. Also queries .eq('status', 'pending') which won't match uppercase 'PENDING' records. Both approve and reject operations will fail.
Updates status to 'pending' (lowercase) — same case mismatch as above.

integration_issues.issue: Admin validate queue at /engagement/validate shows 0 pending even when PENDING records exist in DB because the query uses lowercase 'pending' vs DB uppercase 'PENDING'

action_items: FIX CRITICAL: Update all status values in engagement.ts to uppercase: 'pending' → 'PENDING', 'approved' → 'APPROVED', 'rejected' → 'REJECTED'

FIX CRITICAL: submitEngagementProof INSERT is missing required NOT NULL fields: submission_date (use today's date), file_size_bytes (use file.size), mime_type (use file.type). Also proof_url must not be null (use storage_path URL or placeholder).
FIX: validateEngagementSubmission UPDATE to approved must include approved_by and approved_at fields (DB check constraint requires these when status=APPROVED)
FIX: validateEngagementSubmission UPDATE to rejected must include rejected_by and rejected_at fields (similar constraint likely applies)
NOTE: The expires_at fix from this iteration is correctly implemented — just insufficient alone to fix the workflow

NOTE: ValidateQueueClient two-phase reject UI (showRejectInput, handleRejectClick, handleRejectConfirm) is correctly implemented in code but cannot be UI-tested because queue never shows any submissions
critical_code_review_comments: app/actions/engagement.ts line 240: status: 'pending' → must be 'PENDING' (DB constraint)
app/actions/engagement.ts line 235-242: INSERT missing required fields: submission_date, file_size_bytes, mime_type, proof_url (non-null)
app/actions/engagement.ts line 305: status: 'pending' → must be 'PENDING' (resubmit action)
app/actions/engagement.ts line 353: decision values 'approved'/'rejected' → must be 'APPROVED'/'REJECTED'
app/actions/engagement.ts line 353: When approving, must also set approved_by and approved_at; when rejecting, set rejected_by and rejected_at

success_rate.backend: 0% — entire engagement submission/validation workflow fails due to case mismatch
success_rate.frontend: 30% — validate queue UI loads correctly (empty state), categories page works, admin redirect works; but queue integration completely broken

seed_data_creation: Created and deleted a test submission (id: 46e092fe-6a80-47d2-ab68-ce2e58532394) using Supabase service role key for testing purposes. Data cleaned up.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 11 testing done. Critical case mismatch found: action code uses lowercase status values (pending/approved/rejected) but DB check constraint requires uppercase (PENDING/APPROVED/REJECTED). Also INSERT is missing required NOT NULL columns. After fixes, test: (1) submit proof as worker/staff user, (2) verify submission appears in validate queue, (3) test approve flow (check approved_by/approved_at are set), (4) test reject flow (two-phase UI: reason panel appears, empty reason blocked, reason filled then confirmed). No worker credentials in test_credentials.md - may need to use Supabase service role to insert test data or create worker account.
rca_of_issue: Root cause: DB schema uses uppercase status values (check constraint: PENDING/APPROVED/REJECTED) but action code uses lowercase string literals. This prevents: (1) INSERT of new submissions (check constraint 23514), (2) querying pending submissions (case-sensitive match returns empty), (3) updating to approved/rejected status. Additionally, the INSERT is missing 4 required NOT NULL columns (submission_date, file_size_bytes, mime_type, proof_url). The expires_at fix in this iteration was correct but incomplete — several more constraints must be satisfied for a successful INSERT.
